headline: SUNRATE Unveils Sunrate.AI, Defining Agentic Global Payments
summary: SUNRATE, the global payment and treasury management platform, today unveiled Sunrate.AI at SuperAI, defining 'Agentic Global Payments' — a new category of AI-native global payment infrastructure built to automate and manage complex enterprise workflows.
